detectors.description:
EternalMoon.sendETHToFee(uint256) (EternalMoon.sol#755-761) sends eth to arbitrary user
	Dangerous calls:
	- _teamAddress.transfer(amount.div(2)) (EternalMoon.sol#757)
	- _marketingFunds.transfer(amount.div(2)) (EternalMoon.sol#759)
detectors.markdown:
[EternalMoon.sendETHToFee(uint256)](EternalMoon.sol#L755-L761) sends eth to arbitrary user
	Dangerous calls:
	- [_teamAddress.transfer(amount.div(2))](EternalMoon.sol#L757)
	- [_marketingFunds.transfer(amount.div(2))](EternalMoon.sol#L759)

detectors.description:
Reentrancy in EternalMoon.openTrading() (EternalMoon.sol#765-813):
	External calls:
	- uniswapV2Pair = IUniswapV2Factory(_uniswapV2Router.factory()).createPair(address(this),_uniswapV2Router.WETH()) (EternalMoon.sol#777-779)
	- uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp) (EternalMoon.sol#781-795)
	External calls sending eth:
	- uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp) (EternalMoon.sol#781-795)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- tradingOpen = true (EternalMoon.sol#803)
	EternalMoon.tradingOpen (EternalMoon.sol#367) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- EternalMoon.openTrading() (EternalMoon.sol#765-813)
detectors.markdown:
Reentrancy in [EternalMoon.openTrading()](EternalMoon.sol#L765-L813):
	External calls:
	- [uniswapV2Pair = IUniswapV2Factory(_uniswapV2Router.factory()).createPair(address(this),_uniswapV2Router.WETH())](EternalMoon.sol#L777-L779)
	- [uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp)](EternalMoon.sol#L781-L795)
	External calls sending eth:
	- [uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp)](EternalMoon.sol#L781-L795)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- [tradingOpen = true](EternalMoon.sol#L803)
	[EternalMoon.tradingOpen](EternalMoon.sol#L367) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [EternalMoon.openTrading()](EternalMoon.sol#L765-L813)

detectors.description:
Reentrancy in EternalMoon._transfer(address,address,uint256) (EternalMoon.sol#621-723):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (EternalMoon.sol#695)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (EternalMoon.sol#737-749)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (EternalMoon.sol#701)
		- _teamAddress.transfer(amount.div(2)) (EternalMoon.sol#757)
		- _marketingFunds.transfer(amount.div(2)) (EternalMoon.sol#759)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (EternalMoon.sol#721)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (EternalMoon.sol#929)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (EternalMoon.sol#909)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (EternalMoon.sol#911)
	EternalMoon._rOwned (EternalMoon.sol#331) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- EternalMoon._takeTeam(uint256) (EternalMoon.sol#923-931)
	- EternalMoon._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (EternalMoon.sol#883-919)
	- EternalMoon.balanceOf(address) (EternalMoon.sol#447-451)
	- EternalMoon.constructor(address,address) (EternalMoon.sol#393-411)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (EternalMoon.sol#721)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (EternalMoon.sol#937)
	EternalMoon._rTotal (EternalMoon.sol#343) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- EternalMoon._getCurrentSupply() (EternalMoon.sol#1079-1089)
	- EternalMoon._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (EternalMoon.sol#935-941)
	- EternalMoon.constructor(address,address) (EternalMoon.sol#393-411)
	- EternalMoon.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (EternalMoon.sol#551-573)
detectors.markdown:
Reentrancy in [EternalMoon._transfer(address,address,uint256)](EternalMoon.sol#L621-L723):
	External calls:
	- [swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance)](EternalMoon.sol#L695)
		- [uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp)](EternalMoon.sol#L737-L749)
	External calls sending eth:
	- [sendETHToFee(address(this).balance)](EternalMoon.sol#L701)
		- [_teamAddress.transfer(amount.div(2))](EternalMoon.sol#L757)
		- [_marketingFunds.transfer(amount.div(2))](EternalMoon.sol#L759)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- [_tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee)](EternalMoon.sol#L721)
		- [_rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam)](EternalMoon.sol#L929)
		- [_rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount)](EternalMoon.sol#L909)
		- [_rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount)](EternalMoon.sol#L911)
	[EternalMoon._rOwned](EternalMoon.sol#L331) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [EternalMoon._takeTeam(uint256)](EternalMoon.sol#L923-L931)
	- [EternalMoon._transferStandard(address,address,uint256)](EternalMoon.sol#L883-L919)
	- [EternalMoon.balanceOf(address)](EternalMoon.sol#L447-L451)
	- [EternalMoon.constructor(address,address)](EternalMoon.sol#L393-L411)
	- [_tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee)](EternalMoon.sol#L721)
		- [_rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee)](EternalMoon.sol#L937)
	[EternalMoon._rTotal](EternalMoon.sol#L343) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [EternalMoon._getCurrentSupply()](EternalMoon.sol#L1079-L1089)
	- [EternalMoon._reflectFee(uint256,uint256)](EternalMoon.sol#L935-L941)
	- [EternalMoon.constructor(address,address)](EternalMoon.sol#L393-L411)
	- [EternalMoon.tokenFromReflection(uint256)](EternalMoon.sol#L551-L573)

EternalMoon.allowance(address,address).owner (EternalMoon.sol#473) shadows:
